artifact: Shanghai is matched as the circuit location, then distinct race years are listed.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT r.year FROM races r JOIN circuits c ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId WHERE c.location = 'Shanghai' ORDER BY r.year;
